_comment: Fixed JSON output template for company-domain-finder. Every key must be present in every output.
_confidence_level_values: Must be one of: high, medium, low, or null (when no domain found)
_search_methods_values: Any combination of: web_search, wikipedia, page_verify, playwright_verify, whois_dig, duckduckgo_html, baidu_search
evidence_sources: https://www.mubadala.com/ — page title and footer copyright confirm company name
